name: Simple Text Generation
input: Write a 50-word description of modern interior design trends
validations: model equals claude-opus-4-6 or contains claude

name: Long Context Processing
input: Analyze this text (2000+ words provided): Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet... [LARGE TEXT]. Provide a 200-word summary of the key themes and concepts discussed. Focus on identifying the main arguments, supporting points, and any conclusions drawn. Structure your analysis as a coherent summary that captures the essence of the original text while being significantly more concise. Pay special attention to any repeated concepts or themes that appear throughout the text. Your summary should be suitable for someone who hasn't read the original material but needs to understand its core message and significance.

name: Error Handling
validations: status equals error or error_type present
note: This test validates the error handling path. It may require special setup (e.g., invalid API key or network interruption) to trigger a real error.
